title: selaginella selaginoides
intro: Selaginella selaginoides, also known as Spikemoss or Spike Moss, is a low-growing, evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which have been attributed to its high content of saponins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Selaginella selaginoides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions, including bronchitis and other respiratory issues.
